examplemod.configuration.title: Example Mod Configs
tensura_minecolonies.colony.created.gobl: News of your new goblin town spreads far and wide. Wild goblins drawn to your banner will appear in your territory — name them, and they will serve.
tensura_minecolonies.colony.created.orc: Whispers of your orc settlement carry on the wind. Wild orcs answering the call will arrive in your territory — name them, and they will serve.
